description: Complete catalog of ALL XStore Geneva Actions (GAs) across all teams and operation groups. Covers FC Shell / DcM / manual operation translation and all ACIS operations.

usage.calling_pattern: See coding ability 'geneva-action-call' for acis.execute() / acis.submit() usage.
usage.parameter_order: Parameters listed in 'parameters' array are positional â€” order matters for acis.execute().

environment_routing.description: Use tenant type to select the correct GA when duplicates exist across operation groups.
rules: XPF (PilotFish) tenants â†’ prefer Kiona/ GAs (use MachineName, not NodeId)
Direct Drive tenants â†’ prefer DirectDriveDelegatedSafe/ if DD-specific GA exists, else FabricCrossService/
XStore Fabric tenants â†’ prefer FabricCrossService/ (cross-service), then SustainabilityDelegatedSafe/
If a GA is marked deprecated, use the replacement listed in 'deprecated_use_instead'
